mission: Finish Capsule v1 and v2 as a production-grade OSS runtime adapter/control-plane SDK.

tasks.title: Add reusable adapter contract test helpers
successCriteria: Core exports helpers for asserting adapter metadata, executable capability consistency, unsupported public operations, and receipt shape
Helpers do not call live providers for unsupported capability checks
Core tests cover helper behavior

tasks.title: Apply contract tests across every real adapter
successCriteria: Docker, E2B, Daytona, Modal, Neon, Cloudflare, Cloud Run, Vercel, Kubernetes, Lambda, ECS, and EC2 each run the shared contract suite
Capabilities that lack public implementations are marked unsupported instead of experimental or emulated
pnpm test passes without provider credentials

tasks.title: Add live test gate utilities
successCriteria: A shared test helper skips live tests unless CAPSULE_LIVE_TESTS=1
Provider-specific credential checks produce clear skip reasons
No live test runs by default in CI

tasks.title: Add Docker live integration tests
successCriteria: Docker sandbox create, exec, file read/write/list, destroy are covered when Docker is available
Docker job.run timeout and network none behavior are covered
Containers are cleaned up after test failure

tasks.title: Add E2B live integration test skeleton
successCriteria: Live test is skipped unless E2B credentials are present
Sandbox create, exec, file operations, and destroy are tested
Docs list required environment variables

tasks.title: Add Daytona live integration test skeleton
successCriteria: Live test is skipped unless Daytona credentials are present
Sandbox lifecycle and file operations are covered
Failure cleanup is best-effort and documented

tasks.title: Add Modal live integration test skeleton
successCriteria: Live test is skipped unless Modal configuration is present
Sandbox create, exec, read/write, destroy are covered
Known file listing gap remains unsupported

tasks.title: Implement Docker sandbox port exposure
successCriteria: Docker sandbox create supports requested exposed ports
Capability map and docs describe local-only semantics
Tests cover port flag generation without requiring external network access

tasks.title: Implement Docker sandbox snapshot notes and explicit unsupported restore
successCriteria: Snapshot/restore capability declarations match implemented public APIs
If no API is exposed, capabilities are unsupported and docs explain why
Tests guard against false support

tasks.title: Add job status and cancel interfaces to core
successCriteria: Core types include job status and cancel specs/results
Capsule facade exposes job.status and job.cancel with UnsupportedCapabilityError behavior
Existing adapters compile with explicit unsupported behavior

tasks.title: Implement Cloud Run job status and cancel
successCriteria: Cloud Run adapter maps job execution status where API supports it
Cancel/delete semantics are explicit and documented
Tests cover REST request mapping

tasks.title: Implement Kubernetes job status and cancel
successCriteria: Kubernetes adapter reads Job status from Batch API
Cancel deletes or patches the Job with explicit semantics
Tests cover status phases and cancel request mapping

tasks.title: Implement ECS task status and stop
successCriteria: ECS adapter can describe task status from task ARN
Cancel maps to StopTask
Receipts include task ARN and status metadata

tasks.title: Implement Lambda invocation status metadata
successCriteria: Lambda job.run receipts include executed version, request id when available, and FunctionError
Unsupported async status semantics remain explicit
Tests cover successful, failed, and malformed payload cases

tasks.title: Add service status update and delete interfaces to core
successCriteria: Core types model service.status, service.update, and service.delete
Capsule facade throws UnsupportedCapabilityError for unsupported service operations
Contract tests cover unsupported service lifecycle methods

tasks.title: Implement Cloud Run service status and delete
successCriteria: Cloud Run service status maps ready/deploying/failed states
Delete maps to Cloud Run Admin API delete
Tests cover URL/status/resource receipt mapping

tasks.title: Implement Kubernetes service status and delete
successCriteria: Kubernetes adapter can read Deployment and Service status
Delete removes Deployment and Service in the configured namespace
Tests cover LoadBalancer and cluster-local URL handling

tasks.title: Implement ECS service status and delete
successCriteria: ECS adapter describes service rollout state
Delete supports scale-to-zero and delete-service semantics
Tests cover AWS SDK command inputs

tasks.title: Add edge version release and rollback interfaces to core
successCriteria: Core types model edge version/release/rollback where providers support it
Unsupported behavior remains loud
Contract tests cover unsupported edge operations

tasks.title: Implement Vercel deployment alias and status support
successCriteria: Vercel adapter can fetch deployment status
Alias/release behavior is modeled separately from deploy
Tests cover REST calls and team query parameters

tasks.title: Implement Cloudflare Worker route support
successCriteria: Cloudflare adapter can configure routes when routes are provided
Bindings/secrets remain unsupported unless explicitly implemented
Tests cover worker upload plus route API calls

tasks.title: Add database branch reset and migration interfaces
successCriteria: Core types model optional branch reset and migration operations
Neon capability declarations stay honest
Unsupported operations throw consistently

tasks.title: Implement Neon branch reset where API supports it
successCriteria: Neon adapter maps branch reset to real Neon API if supported
If API support is absent or unsafe, capability remains unsupported with docs
Tests cover the chosen behavior

tasks.title: Create preview orchestration package
successCriteria: A package or core module composes multiple Capsule instances into one preview environment
Preview resource graph records service edge database and job resources
Failures produce receipts and cleanup metadata

tasks.title: Implement preview cleanup orchestration
successCriteria: Cleanup walks preview resources in reverse dependency order
Cleanup is idempotent and records receipts
Partial cleanup failures are reported without hiding completed cleanup

tasks.title: Add preview orchestration tests with fake adapters
successCriteria: Tests cover successful preview creation
Tests cover service failure after database branch creation
Tests cover cleanup after partial failure

tasks.title: Add machine start stop destroy interfaces to core
successCriteria: Core models machine.start, machine.stop, and machine.destroy
Unsupported behavior is contract-tested
Docs emphasize machine primitives are leakier than service/job primitives

tasks.title: Implement EC2 machine status start stop destroy
successCriteria: EC2 adapter maps status/start/stop/destroy to AWS SDK commands
Receipts include instance id and state
Tests cover command inputs without live AWS calls

tasks.title: Implement Fly Machines adapter
successCriteria: New @capsule/adapter-fly package authenticates through Fly API token
machine.create and job.run are implemented honestly
Docs, CLI, tests, and provider matrix include Fly

tasks.title: Implement Azure Container Apps adapter
successCriteria: New @capsule/adapter-azure-container-apps package supports job.run and service.deploy
Azure auth/config requirements are explicit
Docs, CLI, tests, and provider matrix include Azure Container Apps

tasks.title: Add provider credential diagnostics to CLI doctor
successCriteria: CLI doctor can report configured and missing provider credentials without printing secret values
Docker daemon check remains available
Tests or smoke commands cover output shape

tasks.title: Add CLI commands for service deploy status and delete
successCriteria: CLI exposes service deploy/status/delete for providers that support them
Unsupported providers fail with clear messages
Docs include concrete command examples

tasks.title: Add CLI commands for job status and cancel
successCriteria: CLI exposes job status/cancel where adapters support them
Receipt-file behavior works for status and cancel
Docs include examples

tasks.title: Harden policy secret redaction
successCriteria: Secret redaction covers stdout stderr and LogEntry arrays
Tests cover exact values repeated values and absent policy
No adapter logs provider tokens or raw secrets

tasks.title: Add policy enforcement notes for every adapter
successCriteria: Receipts include notes for native delegated emulated unsupported or best-effort policy enforcement
Docker network none and allowlist semantics are documented
Cloud providers do not claim OS-level enforcement unless provider API supports it

tasks.title: Add optional receipt signing interface
successCriteria: Core exposes a minimal signer interface without adding heavy dependencies
Unsigned receipts remain default
Tests cover deterministic signing with a fake signer

tasks.title: Add receipt schema JSON export
successCriteria: Receipt schema is published as JSON Schema or generated artifact
Docs link to the schema
Tests validate representative receipts against the schema

tasks.title: Upgrade examples to env-gated real adapters
successCriteria: Examples default to mock mode where credentials are absent
Examples can use real adapters when env vars are present
Every example states whether it calls real provider APIs

tasks.title: Add real provider quickstarts
successCriteria: Docs include quickstarts for Docker, E2B, Daytona, Modal, Neon, Cloudflare, Cloud Run, Vercel, Kubernetes, Lambda, ECS, and EC2
Each quickstart lists required credentials and cleanup behavior
Unsafe/local caveats are explicit

tasks.title: Normalize README package and provider matrix
successCriteria: README matrix matches actual capability maps
README separates real adapters from mock modeling package
Install and quickstart sections include package-specific commands

tasks.title: Expand security model with provider-specific caveats
successCriteria: Security docs cover Docker, E2B, Daytona, Modal, Kubernetes, cloud jobs, edge, database branches, and machines
Docs distinguish Capsule observation from provider attestation
Secrets guidance is concrete

tasks.title: Add adapter author guide and contract test template
successCriteria: Docs show how to implement a new adapter
Docs include a minimal test template using contract helpers
Support level examples explain native emulated experimental unsupported

tasks.title: Add Changesets release workflow
successCriteria: Repo includes Changesets or an equivalent lightweight release process
Package publish config is explicit for public packages
CI validates package build before publish

tasks.title: Add package provenance and npm publish hardening
successCriteria: Release docs describe npm provenance and token requirements
No package accidentally publishes examples or local harness state
Package files fields are audited

tasks.title: Add generated API reference docs
successCriteria: Typedoc or a minimal equivalent produces API reference for public packages
Generated docs are either committed intentionally or excluded with documented command
README links to API reference workflow

tasks.title: Add package export map audit tests
successCriteria: Tests verify every public package exports its entrypoint
Built declaration files exist after build
Examples import packages through public exports only

tasks.title: Improve autopilot runner issue selection and locking
successCriteria: Runner does not start issues labeled blocked or needs-design
Runner records lock state robustly and recovers stale locks
Dry-run never creates worktrees or labels

tasks.title: Add autopilot PR and issue reconciliation
successCriteria: Runner detects existing PRs for issue branches
Runner comments clear status on issue completion or failure
Runner avoids duplicate PRs

tasks.title: Add Linear mirror script for the task graph
successCriteria: Script can create Linear issues from .capsule/tasks.json when LINEAR_API_KEY is present
GitHub issue creation remains independent
Docs explain GitHub-only and Linear/Symphony modes

tasks.title: Add Symphony reference setup notes
successCriteria: Docs explain how Capsule's WORKFLOW.md maps to Symphony
Docs explain Linear-first limitation and GitHub-backed local runner fallback
Overnight runbook includes monitoring and stop commands

tasks.title: Add architecture decision records
successCriteria: ADRs cover plain TypeScript over Effect for v1, no DB/server/dashboard in SDK core, and adapter-first design
Tradeoffs gained/lost are explicit
README links to ADRs

tasks.title: Add OSS comparison evidence updates
successCriteria: Comparison doc includes files-sdk and ComputeSDK with source links
Capsule differences are grounded in adapter/domain/capability design
No competitor claims are inflated

tasks.title: Add CONTRIBUTING issue taxonomy
successCriteria: Contributing docs explain labels, task graph, and contract expectations
Provider teams know how to propose official adapters
Good first issue guidance avoids shallow work

tasks.title: Add repo badges and OSS polish
successCriteria: README includes CI, license, TypeScript, and package status badges where accurate
Repo description and topics are documented in maintainer runbook
No badges claim unpublished packages are on npm

tasks.title: Run final v1 readiness audit
successCriteria: A checklist maps every original prompt requirement to shipped, partial, or intentionally out of scope
pnpm capsule:gap, typecheck, test, and build pass
Known limitations and next PRs are documented
